title: Shield By Side
description: Actually hold your shield by your side (like in 3rd person) and reduce the amount of useful screen space the shield takes up!
body:
Shield By Side

- The player has finally learned how to hold their shield by their side while they're not using it! - Since the player is now \****properly***\* holding their shield, it'll take up less important screen space! Now that the shield is held by the player's side, it'll also now be consistently held the same way in 3rd person!
   (as it should be) --- Check out my other projects! [https://modrinth.com/user/zanderest](https://modrinth.com/user/zanderest)
